meaning: adj.(阿根廷总统)庇隆的,庇隆主义的,庇隆主义者的
examples: Fernandez's Peronist party has a majority in both houses.
If not, they will be hostages of the Peronist right and the opposition.
But as she spoke some of her supporters broke into the Peronist party anthem.
This gave him absolute control over the many Peronist governors and members of the legislature.
His successor, Carlos Menem, a Peronist, would carry out the free-market reforms he had eschewed.
